name: gdpr-uk
description: UK GDPR & Data Protection Act 2018 compliance toolkit. Reviews code and data flows for compliance gaps, drafts privacy documents from full templates (privacy notices, RoPA, DPIAs, processor agreements, LIAs, TRAs, breach notifications), runs an end-to-end DSAR response workflow, and answers UK data protection questions with citations to UK GDPR articles, DPA 2018 sections, the Data (Use and Access) Act 2025, and ICO guidance.
